result.markdown: --- date: last-modified date-format: "YYYY/MM/DD" title: "31. Critical Values of the *q* Distribution" subtitle: "Reference Tables for the Tukey Test" reference-location: margin resources: - tables/make_tukey_q_table.R - tables/tukey_q_critical_values.csv - tables/tukey_q_critical_values.tex - tables/tukey_q_critical_values.pdf --- ::: {.cell} ::: This page reproduces critical values of the studentized range statistic $q$ used in Tukey's honestly significant difference procedure. The table is generated for - $\\alpha = 0.50, 0.20, 0.10, 0.05, 0.025, 0.01, 0.005, 0.001$ - $k = 2$ to $20$, then $22, 24, 26, 28, 30, 32, 34, 36, 38, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80, 90, 100$ - $\\nu = 1$ to $20$, then $24, 30, 40, 60, 120, \\infty$ The source files are available here: - [R script](tables/make_tukey_q_table.R) - [CSV values](tables/tukey_q_critical_values.csv) - [LaTeX source](tables/tukey_q_critical_values.tex) - [PDF table](tables/tukey_q_critical_values.pdf) ```{=html} ```
